description: Detailed VM-level health and resource metrics for model-serving VMs in the GenAI BOSH deployment. Select a model to see only the VMs serving it. Run scripts/configure-vm-model-mapping.sh to populate the Model dropdown with your foundation's model-to-VM mapping.

panels.description: CPU utilization (user + system) per VM serving the selected model.
panels.title: CPU Usage (User + Sys) per VM

panels.description: System load average (1 minute) per VM. Values above the CPU core count indicate saturation.
panels.title: System Load (1m avg) per VM

panels.description: Memory utilization percentage per VM serving the selected model.
panels.title: Memory Usage % per VM

panels.description: Memory used in bytes per VM serving the selected model.
panels.title: Memory Used per VM

panels.description: Persistent disk usage for model storage on the selected VMs.
panels.title: Persistent Disk % per VM

panels.description: Ephemeral disk usage per VM serving the selected model.
panels.title: Ephemeral Disk % per VM

panels.description: System disk usage per VM serving the selected model.
panels.title: System Disk % per VM

panels.description: Swap usage per VM. High swap usage can severely degrade model inference performance.
panels.title: Swap Usage % per VM

panels.description: Detailed status of all VMs serving the selected model.
panels.title: VM Status Detail

list.description: Select a model to see only the VMs serving it.
list.label: Model
list.name: Model

title: AI Services - VM Model Health
